proposedOptimization.summary: For P2-6 packages/ui library children, require @juli/ui Vitest in the demo CI path (check:demo or dedicated filter) so Guardrails does not re-discover the same CI gap.
proposedOptimization.details: Issue #412 validated PASS with PASS_WITH_WARNINGS because package.json check:demo omits pnpm --filter @juli/ui test. Local suites passed (27/27). Add a Focus/slice-routing or harness routing hint for packages/ui element issues to treat @juli/ui test wiring as in-scope CI hygiene, or extend check:demo once Architect accepts.

predictedImpact.summary: Prevents repeated WARNING findings on packages/ui siblings and keeps CI aligned with local TDD evidence.

expectedImpact: Fewer PASS_WITH_WARNINGS on packages/ui library issues; CI catches element regressions without relying on local-only runs.
notes: Pipeline complete for #412. Code remains uncommitted on feature/issue-412-ui-core-elements — commit before PR/ship. No product-development optimization emitted (single-issue CI gap, not repeated planning failure).
